items.title: A Stolen Dove Takes Flight Again
items.summary: A participatory artwork honors Alex Odeh, the cheerfully sinister worlds of Trevor Winkfield, and why is Zendaya wearing 3,000-year-old Iranian artifacts?

items.title: Trump Shrinks Utah National Monuments by 90%
items.summary: The administration’s cuts to the Grand Staircase-Escalante and Bears Ears national monuments include sacred Indigenous lands and archaeologically rich sites.

items.title: The Artists Working in Velvet, Amethyst, and Relics
items.summary: An exhibition showcases works by Sky Hopinka, vanessa german, April Bey, and others that have connections to spiritual practices and rituals.

items.title: Four Centuries Later, We Still Don't Get Caravaggio
items.summary: A British docudrama serves as a salutary primer on the Baroque master’s greatest works, but we should be wary of what it tells us about the personality of its subject.
